items.title: Tabular regression and pricing
items.description: Real-estate and insurance models rely on ratios (price per unit), log transforms of skewed targets, and location-derived flags to stabilize linear and tree baselines.

items.title: Churn and retention modeling
items.description: Recency since last login, tenure days, and rolling order counts summarize customer history as derived columns feeding classifiers.

items.title: Demand forecasting with calendars
items.description: Retail and energy forecasts add hour-of-day, holiday, and weekend interactions with promotions to capture seasonality linear models miss.

items.title: Fraud and risk scoring
items.description: Velocity features—transactions per hour, amount-to-average ratios, device-change flags—encode domain suspicion rules as numeric inputs.
